summary: Full-stack software engineer focused on real-time systems and reliable backend services.
Hands-on with embedded/cloud integrations, WebSockets, deployments, and data-driven features.

experience.title: Full Stack Software Engineer

metrics.label: Stacked Technologies
metrics.value: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Laravel, Django, Sequelize, MySQL, Python, Docker, GitHub Actions

metrics.label: Protocols integrated
metrics.value: HTTP, MQTT, WebSocket, DH485, CAN, OOP

highlights: Designed and implemented real-time WebSocket servers/clients for cloud-to-device communication and reliable data synchronization across hardware integrations (Raspberry Pi, Micrologix, Protonode).
Integrated elevator control systems: hall calls, car operations, state tracking, and CAN communication protocols.
Developed and maintained backend systems (Node.js, Laravel, Django, Sequelize, MySQL) with database migrations, REST APIs, and real-time processing.
Built responsive technician and monitoring interfaces, revamping projects with React for modern frontend workflows.
Implemented fault and alarm management with synchronization, timestamps, and edge-case handling.
Applied dispatch algorithms for elevator routing: floor assignments, hall call tracking, and state updates across multiple cars.
Automated server/container deployments with Docker and docker-compose in cloud and embedded environments.
Explored ML/predictive analytics: object detection (YOLOv5, SSD, Faster R-CNN) and time-series power consumption forecasting.

experience.title: IT Specialist
highlights: Managed Moodle server deployments on Raspberry Pi devices to host the Lebanese curriculum efficiently.
Maintained and updated Moodle courses for smooth access and performance.
Administered WordPress site: new posts, content updates, and landing-page improvements.
Troubleshot Moodle/WordPress issues to ensure continuous availability.
Collaborated with educators to integrate curriculum resources into Moodle for effective online learning.

experience.title: Developer Intern
highlights: Built frontend pages based on REST API calls using HTML/CSS/JavaScript.
Coordinated with a senior developer to deliver features and fixes.
Got hands-on exposure to Node.js, Django, and Laravel.

projects.title: Cloud Elevator Telemetry Pipeline
projects.subtitle: Beytek SAL Offshore
projects.description: Rebuilt the monitoring project from a monolithic Laravel app to a modern React + TypeScript frontend, powered by a real-time cloud telemetry pipeline.
highlights: Migrated the frontend to React + TypeScript and rebuilt monitoring UI components around real-time data streams.
Implemented cloud telemetry transfer from hardware to the server using MQTT, and live backend-to-frontend updates using WebSockets.

projects.title: Edge Telemetry Optimization (CAN to WebSocket)
projects.subtitle: Beytek SAL Offshore
projects.description: Revamped the edge logic for reading and transmitting hardware packets, drastically reducing system overhead on edge devices.
highlights: Revamped the logic for reading and sending packets from CAN to WebSocket using Object-Oriented Programming (OOP).
Optimized processing by parsing only changed data instead of parsing and applying logic to every packet.

projects.title: Cable Damage Detection
projects.subtitle: Machine Learning Integration
projects.description: Automated the inspection of elevator shaft cables using computer vision and object detection models.
highlights: Built image detection/specification pipeline for identifying damaged elevator shaft cables.
Trained and evaluated YOLO-based models for high-accuracy object detection in low-light shaft environments.

projects.title: Moodle on Edge Devices
projects.subtitle: Lebanese Alternative Learning
projects.description: Managed lightweight Moodle server deployments on Raspberry Pi devices to host and distribute the Lebanese curriculum in low-resource environments.
highlights: Deployed educational platforms on low-powered edge hardware to operate effectively in offline or low-bandwidth areas.
Maintained and troubleshot system issues ensuring continuous availability for students.

ongoingLearning.title: AI & Prompt Engineering - AUB AI-Assisted Coding - SU25-26
